en.extract:
The cinnamon-chested flycatcher (Ficedula buruensis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Buru, Seram, and Kai Besar. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''cinnamon-chested flycatcher''' ('''''Ficedula buruensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]]. It is found in [[Buru]], [[Seram]], and [[Kai Besar]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
